channel.title: moldable development on Magistr and Maps
channel.description: Recent content in moldable development on Magistr and Maps

item.title: A feed to think with
item.description: The first night I got access to move.nl I spent four hours reading apartment listings and went to bed at one in the morning. I built a tool to watch the market so I do not have to.

item.title: The Sight of Systems
item.description: I’ll never forget that feeling—ingesting millions of metrics into a tool like Grafana or Honeycomb for the first time. Before that, I was blind. I was guessing.
